title: The Unmapped Library

features.name: unmapped-stacks
features.desc-on-touch: Shelves that follow no order the archive recognizes. The catalogue says they don't exist. The books say they're the only shelves that ever did.

features.name: wayward-index
features.desc-on-touch: The catalogue is written in the language of the country you're reading it from. That's impossible. The archive has not yet decided if this is a feature or corruption.

features.name: space-warping-door
features.desc-on-touch: Step through: three rooms fit into one corner. The archive suspects this is where it stores the country it couldn't find on any map.

features.name: borrowed-light
features.desc-on-touch: The lamps here are borrowed from places the library borrowed those places from. The light reads as testimony. It knows things it never saw.

features.name: threshold-reader
features.desc-on-touch: A figure made of margins and page-edges. It reads everything that comes through the door. Sometimes it argues with the books. Sometimes the books win the argument by disappearing.

inscription: a full library was here before the archive marked this place as unmapped, and here it remains, reading everything but the catalogue

file.name: Library_Inventory_Parallel_2037_Actual_Locations.idx
file.note: An inventory that lists books in places they're not. Or: books in all the places they could be. Or: the archive, finally learning to count in more than one direction at once.

exits.label: back into the untracked country, toward the fence that ends but the sentence continues
deeper into the unmapped territories, where books are shelving themselves
exits.to: NEW: the self-organizing-stacks, where the library learns what it wants to become

exits.label: up a staircase that wasn't there when you entered, into a reading-room with no roof
exits.to: NEW: the open-study, where the archive and the country read each other under no sky

exits.label: back toward the sentence-country, but each step writes another chapter onto the path
exits.to: NEW: the writing-ground, where the Understory learns to document itself
